title: BEM-587 operator intake autorun
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'OPERATOR_REPLY_INTAKE_AUTORUN.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-587 | Operator Reply Intake Autorun'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:30 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Решение'+sep+sep+'Operator Reply Intake больше не требует ручного запуска оператором.'+sep+sep+'## Механизм'+sep+'1. `operator-reply-intake.yml` запускается вручную или через push-trigger по `governance/triggers/operator_reply_intake.trigger`.'+sep+'2. Для немедленного запуска GPT делает marker commit в trigger file.'+sep+'3. Для регулярного безопасного режима разрешено подключение к `curator-hourly-report.yml`, потому что это единственный разрешённый schedule workflow.'+sep+sep+'## Следующий слой'+sep+'Добавить curator-hourly-report integration: hourly безопасно вызывает intake, фиксирует новые решения и передаёт куратору.'+sep)

workflow=wfs/'operator-reply-intake.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Operator Reply Intake

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/operator_reply_intake.trigger'
      - 'scripts/operator_reply_intake.py'
      - '.github/workflows/operator-reply-intake.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: operator-reply-intake
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  intake-operator-reply:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check reply intake
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/operator_reply_intake.py

      - name: Fetch Telegram updates
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/tmp
          if [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/operator_reply_status.txt
            echo '{"ok":false,"result":[]}' > governance/tmp/operator_reply_updates.json
          else
            OFFSET_FILE="governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json"
            OFFSET=""
            if [ -f "$OFFSET_FILE" ]; then
              LAST=$(python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(p.read_text())
    print(int(data.get('last_update_id',0))+1)
except Exception:
    print('')
PY
)
              if [ -n "$LAST" ] && [ "$LAST" != "1" ]; then OFFSET="?offset=${LAST}"; fi
            fi
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/operator_reply_updates.json -w "%{http_code}" "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/getUpdates${OFFSET}" || echo "000")
            echo "$HTTP_CODE" > governance/tmp/operator_reply_status.txt
          fi

      - name: Parse and record operator reply
        run: python3 scripts/operator_reply_intake.py

      - name: Commit intake result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json governance/operator_decisions governance/tasks/pending governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-587 operator reply intake result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

trigger=triggers/'operator_reply_intake.trigger'
trigger.write_text('BEM-587 trigger operator reply intake at 2026-05-17 | 22:30 (UTC+3)'+sep)

report=reports/'bem587_operator_reply_intake_autorun.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-587 | Operator Reply Intake Autorun | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:30 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'`operator-reply-intake.yml` now has workflow_dispatch plus limited push trigger. A trigger file was committed to run intake immediately without operator action.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem587_operator_reply_intake_autorun','cycle_id':'bem587-operator-reply-intake-autorun','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'trigger':str(trigger),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:30 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem587_operator_reply_intake_autorun']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'trigger':str(trigger),'expected':'operator-reply-intake auto-runs after commit','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:30 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem587_operator_reply_intake_autorun.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-587 PASS: operator-reply-intake autorun trigger added and marker committed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(workflow),str(trigger),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Added limited push trigger for operator-reply-intake and committed marker trigger for immediate polling')
"""
No issue comments.
